problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
